_source: live B4 triage->build chain, connector 0.3.126, session loop-f279bdb5 (2026-06-07)
_proves: grounding 1.0 after muting the siem_events_for_incident execute_api_request fan-out (commit f7d0845)

args.step_name: Enrich Destination IP - IP Quality Score

args.summary: Block outbound traffic to malicious IP 108.17.204.5 (credential harvesting endpoint)

args.yaml_text:
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Triage - Enrich & Block Malicious Destination IP
    description: "Enriches external IPs found in an alert against VirusTotal, IP Quality Score, and FortiGuard IOC; stages an IP block on configured firewall."
    parameters: []
    steps:
      - name: Start
        type: start
        module: alerts
        next: Enrich Destination IP VirusTotal
      
      - name: Enrich Destination IP VirusTotal
        type: connector
        connector: virustotal
        operation: query_ip
        config: 246b2e51-4eaa-42bf-a5b2-8ae0907c0b37
        params:
          ip: "{{ vars.input.records[0].destinationIp }}"
        next: Enrich Destination IP IP Quality Score
      
      - name: Enrich Destination IP IP Quality Score
        type: connector
        connector: ip-quality-score
        operation: get_ip_reputation
        config: a244eba1-c4d2-4fba-90d3-3700fd9817c9
        params:
          ip_address: "{{ vars.input.records[0].destinationIp }}"
        next: Enrich Destination IP FortiGuard IOC
      
      - name: Enrich Destination IP FortiGuard IOC
        type: connector
        connector: fortinet-fortiguard-ioc
        operation: ioc_search
        config: 1ca72e75-d121-4876-bc4d-76fd39d4b896
        params:
          indicator: "{{ vars.input.records[0].destinationIp }}"
        next: Block Malicious IP
      
      - name: Block Malicious IP
        type: connector
        connector: fortigate-firewall
        operation: block_ip_new
        config: ""
        params:
          ip: "{{ vars.input.records[0].destinationIp }}"
          ip_addresses: "{{ vars.input.records[0].destinationIp }}"
          ip_type: IPv4
          method: Policy Based
          ip_block_policy: Malicious IP Block
          ip_group_name: Credential_Theft_Destinations
          time_to_live: 1 Year
          duration: 31536000
        next: Complete
      
      - name: Complete
        type: end

playbooks:
  - name: Alert Triage - Enrich & Block Malicious Destination IP
    description: "Enriches external IPs found in an alert against VirusTotal, IP Quality Score, and FortiGuard IOC; stages an IP block on configured firewall after approval."
    parameters: []
    steps:
      - name: Start
        type: start
        module: alerts
        button_label: Triage Alert
        next: Extract Destination IP
      
      - name: Extract Destination IP
        type: set_variable
        variables:
          destination_ip: "{{ vars.input.records[0].title | regex_search('to (\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+)', '\\1') | first }}"
        next: Enrich Against VirusTotal
      
      - name: Enrich Against VirusTotal
        type: connector
        connector: virustotal
        operation: query_ip
        config: 246b2e51-4eaa-42bf-a5b2-8ae0907c0b37
        params:
          ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
      
      - name: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
        type: connector
        connector: ip-quality-score
        operation: get_ip_reputation
        config: a244eba1-c4d2-4fba-90d3-3700fd9817c9
        params:
          ip_address: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
      
      - name: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
        type: connector
        connector: fortinet-fortiguard-ioc
        operation: ioc_search
        config: 1ca72e75-d121-4876-bc4d-76fd39d4b896
        params:
          indicator: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Review Enrichment
      
      - name: Review Enrichment
        type: manual_input
        prompt: "Review threat intelligence enrichment for {{ vars.destination_ip }}. Proceed with IP block?"
        fields:
          - name: proceed_with_block
            label: "Approve IP Block?"
            type: boolean
            default: "true"
        next: Decide on Block
      
      - name: Decide on Block
        type: decision
        conditions:
          - when: "vars.steps.Review_Enrichment.data.proceed_with_block == true"
            display: "Block IP"
            next: Block Malicious IP
        default_branch:
          display: "Skip Block"
          next: Complete
      
      - name: Block Malicious IP
        type: connector
        connector: fortigate-firewall
        operation: block_ip_new
        config: ""
        params:
          ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
          ip_addresses: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
          ip_type: IPv4
          method: Policy Based
          ip_block_policy: Malicious IP Block
          ip_group_name: Credential_Theft_Destinations
          time_to_live: 1 Year
          duration: 31536000
        next: Complete
      
      - name: Complete
        type: end

playbooks:
  - name: Alert Triage - Enrich & Block Malicious Destination IP
    description: "Enriches external IPs found in an alert against VirusTotal, IP Quality Score, and FortiGuard IOC; stages an IP block on configured firewall after approval."
    parameters: []
    steps:
      - name: Start
        type: start
        module: alerts
        next: Extract Destination IP
      
      - name: Extract Destination IP
        type: set_variable
        variables:
          destination_ip: "{{ vars.input.records[0].title | regex_search('to (\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+)', '\\1') | first }}"
        next: Enrich Against VirusTotal
      
      - name: Enrich Against VirusTotal
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ""
          params:
            ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
      
      - name: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: ip-quality-score
          operation: get_ip_reputation
          config: ""
          params:
            ip_address: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
      
      - name: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: fortinet-fortiguard-ioc
          operation: ioc_search
          config: ""
          params:
            indicator: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Review Enrichment
      
      - name: Review Enrichment
        type: manual_input
        arguments:
          title: "Approve Firewall Block?"
          description: "Destination IP {{ vars.destination_ip }} has been enriched. Review threat intelligence and approve IP block on firewall."
          inputs:
            - name: approve_block
              kind: checkbox
              label: "Yes, proceed with IP block"
              default: "true"
        options:
          - display: "Approve Block"
            primary: true
            next: Block Malicious IP
          - display: "Skip Block"
            next: Complete
      
      - name: Block Malicious IP
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ""
          params:
            ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
            ip_type: IPv4
            method: Policy Based
            ip_block_policy: Malicious IP Block
            ip_group_name: Credential_Theft_Destinations
            time_to_live: 1 Year
            duration: 31536000
        next: Complete
      
      - name: Complete
        type: end

records.title: Outbound cleartext password usage from non guest network from 192.168.77.49 to 108.17.204.5 on port 110

args.yaml_text:
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Triage - Enrich & Block Malicious Destination IP
    description: "Enriches external IPs found in an alert against VirusTotal, IP Quality Score, and FortiGuard IOC; stages an IP block on configured firewall after approval."
    parameters: []
    steps:
      - name: Start
        type: start
        module: alerts
        next: Extract Destination IP
      
      - name: Extract Destination IP
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          destination_ip: "{{ vars.input.records[0].title | regex_search('to (\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+)', '\\\\1') }}"
        next: Enrich Against VirusTotal
      
      - name: Enrich Against VirusTotal
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ""
          params:
            ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
      
      - name: Enrich Against IP Quality Score
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: ip-quality-score
          operation: get_ip_reputation
          config: ""
          params:
            ip_address: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
      
      - name: Enrich Against FortiGuard IOC
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: fortinet-fortiguard-ioc
          operation: ioc_search
          config: ""
          params:
            indicator: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
        next: Review Enrichment
      
      - name: Review Enrichment
        type: manual_input
        arguments:
          title: "Approve Firewall Block for {{ vars.destination_ip }}?"
          description: "Destination IP has been enriched against threat intelligence sources. Review findings and approve IP block on firewall."
          inputs:
            - name: comment
              kind: textarea
              label: "Analyst Notes"
              required: false
        options:
          - display: "Approve & Block IP"
            primary: true
            next: Block Malicious IP
          - display: "Skip Block"
            next: Complete
      
      - name: Block Malicious IP
        type: connector
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ""
          params:
            method: Policy Based
            ip_block_policy: Malicious IP Block
            ip_type: IPv4
            ip: "{{ vars.destination_ip }}"
            ip_group_name: Credential_Theft_Destinations
        next: Complete
      
      - name: Complete
        type: end
